privileged_info_summary: The task is to format a Git user guide document by applying professional styling to callout boxes and headings in LibreOffice Writer. The document is synthetically generated using python-docx with 4 NOTE, 3 WARNING, 3 TIP, and 5 CODE callout boxes marked with text prefixes. The document contains 7 section headings (Getting Started with Git, Installing Git, Initial Configuration, Working with Repositories, Branching and Merging, Remote Repositories, Best Practices) that require specific heading level styles (1 or 2) to be applied. Target text snippets are embedded in the generated document to identify each callout box for verification after styling. The source and output file paths are /home/ga/Documents/git_guide_draft.docx and /home/ga/Documents/git_guide_styled.docx respectively.
